summary: Canonical tool repos surfaced for planner context — not a portfolio showcase.

projects.name: MeTuber
projects.tagline: Real-time webcam filters and virtual camera output
projects.description: Desktop app for live video effects with OBS/UnityCapture virtual camera support. Includes a LAN web filter tester — no PyQt GUI required on test devices.
highlights: Artistic, color, distortion, and basic effect categories

projects.name: StreamerTools
projects.tagline: Twitch bots and bot scaffolds only
projects.description: Streaming automation focused on Twitch IRC bots. MeTuber duplicate code removed — webcam filters live exclusively in MeTuber.
highlights: twitch_bots/scaffold — base bot class and .env template

projects.name: DreamVault
projects.tagline: Dream.OS governance, planner, and runtime automation
projects.description: Canonical repo for lane dispatch, repo consolidation, verification gates, and the planner JSON that powers this site.
highlights: Discord closeout cards and task gates

projects.name: websites
projects.tagline: Multi-site WordPress and static deploy monorepo
projects.description: Package-based WordPress architecture plus static surfaces like weareswarm.online. Deploy via unified_deployer.
